ddls:
CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the resident */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the resident (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the household */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the resident */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Educational attainment (0=No College, 1=Some College, 2=College Degree) */,
  "employment_status" INTEGER /* Employment status (1=Employed, 0=Unemployed) */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Health insurance status (1=Insured, 0=Uninsured) */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status (1=Has disability, 0=Does not have disability) */,
  "proximity_to_evacuation_route" REAL /* Proximity to evacuation route (in miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evacuation_history" (
  "evacuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evacuation record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident associated with this record */,
  "previous_storm_experience" INTEGER /* Experience with previous storms (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "evacuation_decision" INTEGER /* Evacuation decision made (1=Evacuated, 0=Did not evacuate) */,
  "evacuation_expense" REAL /* Expenses incurred during evacuation */,
  "lost_income" REAL /* Income lost during the evacuation period */,
  "storm_type" INTEGER /* Type of storm (1=Hurricane, 2=Flood, 3=Severe Storm) */,
  "storm_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the storm (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evacuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evacuation_history_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "information_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the information source record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident associated with this record */,
  "src_local_auth" INTEGER /* Source from local authorities (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_local_media" INTEGER /* Source from local media (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_national_media" INTEGER /* Source from national media (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_internet" INTEGER /* Source from internet (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_peers" INTEGER /* Source from peers (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_social_media" INTEGER /* Source from social media (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  "src_community_meetings" INTEGER /* Source from community meetings (1=Used, 0=Did not use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_information_sources_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the storm condition record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident associated with this record */,
  "see_storm_conditions" INTEGER /* Observed storm conditions (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "see_shop_close" INTEGER /* Observed shops closing (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "see_peer_evac" INTEGER /* Observed peers evacuating (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Observed wind speed (in mph) */,
  "rainfall_amount" REAL /* Observed rainfall amount (in inches) */,
  "flood_conditions" INTEGER /* Observed flood conditions (1=Flooded, 0=Not flooded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_conditions_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evacuation_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the evacuation decision record */,
  "evacuation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evacuation history record */,
  "evac_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to evacuate in minutes */,
  "traffic" INTEGER /* Traffic conditions during evacuation (1=Heavy, 0=Light) */,
  "official_hurricane_watch" INTEGER /* Official hurricane watch status (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "official_evacuation" INTEGER /* Official evacuation order issued (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "transportation_used" INTEGER /* Type of transportation used (1=Car, 2=Public Transport, 3=Other) */,
  "accommodation_cost" REAL /* Cost of accommodation during evacuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evacuation_decisions_evacuation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evacuation_id") REFERENCES evacuation_history ("evacuation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographics summary record */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of residents in the community */,
  "percent_female" REAL /* Percentage of female residents */,
  "avg_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the community */,
  "avg_household_size" REAL /* Average size of households in the community */,
  "avg_num_children" REAL /* Average number of children per household */,
  "percent_insured" REAL /* Percentage of residents with health insurance */,
  "percent_disabled" REAL /* Percentage of residents with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the community resource record */,
  "resource_type" INTEGER /* Type of resource (1=Shelter, 2=Food, 3=Water, 4=Medical) */,
  "resource_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the resource */,
  "resource_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of the resource (1=Available, 0=Not available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource utilization record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community resource */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident utilizing the resource */,
  "utilization_date" TEXT /* Date of resource utilization */,
  "utilization_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of resource utilized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES community_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disaster event record */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of disaster event (1=Hurricane, 2=Flood, 3=Severe Storm) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the disaster event */,
  "event_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the disaster event (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High) */,
  "affected_area" INTEGER /* Area affected by the disaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evacuation_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the evacuation route record */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the evacuation route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the evacuation route (in miles) */,
  "route_conditions" INTEGER /* Conditions of the evacuation route (1=Clear, 2=Blocked, 3=Under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route utilization record */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evacuation route */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident utilizing the route */,
  "utilization_date" TEXT /* Date of route utilization */,
  "utilization_time" TEXT /* Time of route utilization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_utilization_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_utilization_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES evacuation_routes ("route_id")
)
